results.description:
Join math-explorer Emma on a globetrotting adventure through more than 100 math games including Pre-K, Kindergarten, 1st, and 2nd grade!

Learning features (Pre-K to Grade 2)

Counting and Early Number Sense
• Counting and skip counting by 2s, 5s, and 10s
• Start counting from any number
• Connect counting to numerals and answer “How many?”
• Compare and order numbers

Place Value (Base Ten)
• Understand ones, tens, and hundreds place value
• Compose and decompose numbers using ones and tens, then extend to hundreds
• Use expanded form

Addition and Subtraction Facts
• Add and subtract with objects and visuals
• Mental math within 5 and 10, and beyond
• Fact families and strategies such as making 10 and counting on or back

Equations and Number Sentences
• Identify parts of an equation including addends, sum, difference, and the equals sign
• Build number sentences and solve for the missing number
• Tackle multi step and complex equations appropriate for early learners

Even and Odd
• Identify, sort, and explain even and odd numbers

Comparison and Symbols
• Greater than, less than, or equal to using words, symbols, and pictures

Word Problems and Reasoning
• One and two step story problems
• Choose the correct operation
• Use visuals and models to explain thinking

Patterns and Sorting
• Recognize AB, AAB, ABB, and ABC patterns
• Extend, complete, and create patterns
• Classify and sort by attributes such as color, size, and type

Why teachers and parents choose it
• No ads
• No subscriptions
• No external links
• No data collected
• Kid safe and COPPA compliant
• Works offline for home, travel, and classrooms with limited Wi-Fi
• Classroom ready and aligned with widely used school standards and math frameworks
• Professional narration, clear visuals, and positive encouragement
• Used in classrooms all over the world

Friendly animals such as cows, chickens, lions, giraffes, kittens, and puppies, plus robots and silly monsters, keep learners smiling while they build real math confidence.

Download Animal Math Games for Kids and help your learner grow number sense, place value, addition, subtraction, patterns, equations, and word problem skills today.

Apple Terms of Service (EULA)
https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

results.description:
Build strong multiplication skills through focused practice, interactive challenges, and clear feedback while building student confidence and fluency at their own pace.

Multiplication Math Flashcards is a structured, skill-based learning app created by parents and educators. It aligns with widely adopted school learning standards and supports core elementary math concepts used in classrooms worldwide.

MASTER MULTIPLICATION

• Practice specific multiplication facts by choosing individual multipliers
• Adjust number ranges to match your current lesson or skill level
• Reinforce understanding through repeated, targeted practice

BUILD CONFIDENCE & FLUENCY

• Match multiplication equations with correct answers
• Identify equations that share the same product
• Strengthen mental math through visual and audio reinforcement
• Practice efficient strategies instead of memorization alone

WHAT STUDENTS LEARN

• Fluency with multiplication facts within 100
• Understanding how multiplication and division are related
• Using multiplication to solve real-world and word-based problems
• Finding missing values in equations
• Applying properties of operations to solve problems efficiently
• Developing number sense and problem-solving skills

ADDITIONAL FEATURES

• Customizable lessons, quizzes, and flashcard practice
• Professional voice narration for numbers and equations
• Multiple card layouts and visual styles
• No ads, works fully offline
• Kid-safe design with no personal data collection
• Parental controls for sound, music, purchases, and links

Trusted by millions of families worldwide to support math learning at home and in the classroom.
results.trackCensoredName: Multiplication Math Flashcards

results.description:
Explore the animal kingdom with Joey the Kangaroo through the shark aquarium, across the plains of Africa, and deep into Jazz Panda's musical jungle as you complete magical puzzles and explore animated landscapes!

You'll meet lots of new friends like penguins, lions, hippos, giraffes and elephants in aquariums, forests, swamps, jungles and even the north pole! 

• Play the drums with Alex the alligator! 
• Tickle the great tree and see what jumps out! 
• Help Henrietta the hippo brush her teeth! 
• Dive into the aquarium with Sully the shark! 
• Party with Wally the walrus and the penguins!

PARENTS AND TEACHERS
This app challenges kids to solve problems, recognize shapes, memorize pieces, and set small goals as they develop hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills.

We provide parental options and lots of positive encouragement to ensure your child has a safe space to play and learn. Baby Play Time mode lets children of any skill level explore and discover real animal sounds and fun animations. 

"My kids love animal themes and they just fell in love with this game. The game looks like a kid-friendly cartoon. The style and the animation is fantastic." - User Review

"My two yr old loves this. First puzzler he can do. This app will be a staple in my sons learning games." - User Review

"Mission accomplished! My little one always smiles and enjoys while playing it... Thank you!" - User Review 

"Awesome kids app - There's a great variety in puzzles and animals, and there are a lot of cute sounds and animations that become available when a puzzle is completed. My kids had a great time playing with this."

ABOUT
“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!”

- Blake, Amanda, Mike & Urszula, Eggroll Games

results.description:
ANIMAL KINDERGARTEN GAMES brings a delightful learning experience to kids, blending education with entertainment in the most engaging way possible! With a colorful array of adorable animal friends, from Rocco the Rooster to Oliver Horse, children will navigate more than 100 fun kindergarten games. These activities are specifically designed to help your child improve their kindergarten skills while enjoying a thrilling adventure across a bustling city filled with curious animals.

KINDERGARTEN HAS NEVER BEEN THIS FUN!

Whether your child is in kindergarten or preparing for kindergarten, Animal Kindergarten Games is the perfect platform for building strong kindergarten skills. Designed by parents and teachers, this game adheres to learning standards used in real classrooms, ensuring an educational foundation that aligns with school curriculums. It’s ideal for reinforcing what kids are learning in school or giving them a head start in kindergarten and 1st grade.

KEY FEATURES

• Kindergarten Lessons: Learn essential kindergarten concepts like shapes, colors, counting, and more.
• Animal Kindergarten: Join fun animal pals on a learning journey, helping them solve kindergarten challenges in a lively city environment.
• Kindergarten Games: Over 100 fun and educational kindergarten activities designed to make learning exciting and rewarding for young learners.
• Kindergarten Games for Kids: Perfectly suited for kids ages 3–7, with professional narration, lively music, and positive reinforcement to keep them motivated.
• Kindergarten Learning for Kids: Enjoy a wide variety of free-to-play levels, ensuring children can practice and build kindergarten skills without limitations.

KINDERGARTEN MADE EASY

Designed to support young learners, Animal Kindergarten Games offers a range of interactive exercises to help children grasp critical kindergarten concepts. From counting to problem-solving, every activity is tailored to ensure kids build a strong foundation. Whether they are tackling early number skills or engaging in first grade learning games, the experience grows with your child’s abilities.

EDUCATIONAL GAMES FOR KIDS FREE

This game focuses on kindergarten learning while also extending into first grade skills for continued growth. Kids will have fun while practicing counting, comparing numbers, and solving puzzles — making kindergarten a joyous adventure.

results.description:
Welcome to Addition Flashcard Quiz Match, a set of energetic and common core compliant math challenges designed by teachers to motivate and build confidence in kids learning addition!

TAKE THE FLASH CARD QUIZ!
Choose a number range and run a gauntlet of ten random equations! Once complete, players are rewarded with a round of balloon popping fun and a handy report card presents the test results and time taken! For an added challenge, set a time limit for each question!

TWO MEMORY MATCH GAMES!
Match equations to their answer in Flash Card Match! Select any number range and choose "Show Me" mode to leave cards face up for easier play or "Memory" mode to keep cards face down and test your concentration! An alternate match game challenges you to match two equations with the same answer!

CUSTOMIZE YOUR DIFFICULTY
• Choose the best number range for your skill level
• "Show Me" option keeps cards face up for easier play 
• "Peek" button lets you sneak a peek at face down cards
• Set answer time limits or allow unlimited time in quiz game 

CULTIVATE MATH AND REASONING
• Match equations with the same answer 
• Hear the numbers and equations as you touch them
• Positive feedback and balloon popping rewards 

ADDITIONAL FEATURES
• Items, numbers and instructions are professionally narrated 
• Discover new card designs and layouts as you play
• Parental controls for sound, music, purchases and links
• We do not collect personal information from our users

COMMON CORE STANDARDS:
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.OA.A.4
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.OA.A.5
• CCSS.Math.Content.1.OA.B.3
• CCSS.Math.Content.1.OA.C.6
• CCSS.Math.Content.1.OA.D.7
• CCSS.Math.Content.1.NBT.C.4
• CCSS.Math.Content.2.OA.B.2
• CCSS.Math.Content.2.NBT.B.5

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!!”

- Blake, Mike & Amanda, Eggroll Games

results.description:
Educating over 15 million kids in classrooms across the world, the award winning Eggroll Games team presents an all new number learning adventure for toddlers!

Follow Sully Shark, Ralphie Cat, and Chill E. Penguin out of the aquarium, across the backyard, and all the way to Antarctica as you complete counting, sequence, and number challenges to unlock over 30 interactive prizes!

With 27 difficulty levels to master across 9 unique mini-apps, there's lots to do and lots to learn!

NUMBER RECOGNITION
• Choose the correct number from a group
• Tap the peeking number in peek-a-boo
• Drag the number to the correct slot

COUNTING
• Touch items to count them
• Put the correct number of items in the basket

CARDINALITY
• Pop the bubble with the correct number of items
• Pick the number that corresponds with the number of items

SEQUENCE
• Find the number missing from the sequence
• Put the numbers in order
• Connect the dots

ADDITIONAL FEATURES
• Learners earn prizes as they play
• Turn off mini-apps to customize your lesson
• Play with collected prizes in the toy box
• Mini-app icon meters show progress
• A friction-free, safe space for learning

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!”

- Blake, Amanda, Mike & Urszula, Eggroll Games
results.trackCensoredName: Countimals Number School
results.trackName: Countimals Number School

results.description:
Step right up to the silliest baby game show: Whose Toes Are Those?

Can your toddler guess which character is hiding behind the curtain just by looking at their toes?

Each round, kids see a pair of feet and guess who they belong to. It could be a dancing penguin, a cowboy, a tiger, a sasquatch, and more. Choose correctly and the curtain rises with fun music and a silly stage dance. Guess again if you are wrong.

Perfect for toddlers and preschoolers, this endlessly looping guessing game helps build early learning skills like animal recognition, memory, and matching while keeping little ones laughing.

Why parents love it:
• Created by parents and teachers for ages 1 to 4
• Builds attention, recognition, and matching skills
• No ads and no menus for safe and simple play
• Great for car rides, waiting rooms, and quiet time
• Designed for babies, toddlers, and preschoolers

Why kids love it:
• Fun game show atmosphere with surprises
• Cute animals, silly characters, and funny dances
• Positive feedback that encourages guessing
• New characters added regularly

If your child loves peekaboo, baby guessing games, and animal characters, they will love Whose Toes Are Those?

Praise for Whose Toes Are Those:
 "Keeps children laughing while learning… filled with music, dancing, and overall silliness." — KinderTown
 "We absolutely love Whose Toes Are Those!" — Famigo
 "It’s just too cute." — Famigo

results.description:
Building math skills and learning to subtract has never been more fun and intuitive! 

With "Show Me" and "Peek" features, play comes easy even for young learners.

This app adheres to Common Core Standards for math and was designed by parents and teachers. 

LEARNING TO SUBTRACT: 
• Match subtraction equations to their answers
• Choose the best number range for your skill level
• "Show Me" option keeps cards face up for easier play  

BUILDING MATH SKILLS:  
• Match equations with the same answer 
• Hear the numbers and equations as you touch them
• Players are rewarded with balloon popping and positive encouragement 

ADDITIONAL FEATURES: 
• Items, numbers and instructions are professionally narrated

• Discover new card designs and layouts as you play

results.description:
Welcome to Math Flash Card Match, a set of energetic and common core compliant math challenges designed by teachers to motivate and build confidence in kids learning addition, subtraction, multiplication and division!

TAKE THE FLASH CARD QUIZ!
Choose a number range and run a gauntlet of ten random equations! Once complete, players are rewarded with a round of balloon popping fun and a handy report card presents the test results and time taken! For an added challenge, set a time limit for each question!

TWO MEMORY MATCH GAMES!
Match equations to their answer in Flash Card Match! Select any number range and choose "Show Me" mode to leave cards face up for easier play or "Memory" mode to keep cards face down and test your concentration! An alternate match game challenges you to match two equations with the same answer!

CUSTOMIZE YOUR DIFFICULTY
• Choose the best number range for your skill level
• "Show Me" option keeps cards face up for easier play 
• "Peek" button lets you sneak a peek at face down cards
• Set answer time limits or allow unlimited time in quiz game 

CULTIVATE MATH AND REASONING
• Match math equations with the same answer 
• Hear the numbers and equations as you touch them
• Positive feedback and balloon popping rewards 

ADDITIONAL FEATURES
• Items, numbers and instructions are professionally narrated 
• Discover new card designs and layouts as you play
• Parental controls for sound, music, purchases and links
• We do not collect personal information from our users

SUBSCRIPTION TERMS
• A free one hour trial will allow you to access all content
• After the trial expires, you may access the content via subscription
• If you agree to the subscription, you will be charged at the time of agreement and every month thereafter
• You may cancel the subscription at anytime via you iTunes account
• For more information, visit eggrollgames.com/terms

COMMON CORE STANDARDS:
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.OA.A.4
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.OA.A.5
• CCSS.Math.Content.1.OA.B.3
• CCSS.Math.Content.1.OA.C.6
• CCSS.Math.Content.1.OA.D.7
• CCSS.Math.Content.1.NBT.C.4
• CCSS.Math.Content.2.OA.B.2
• CCSS.Math.Content.2.NBT.B.5

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!!”

- Blake, Mike & Amanda, Eggroll Games

results.description:
Lily's farm is full of crazy ANIMATED critters from chickens to cows to airplanes and pizza! Pick from 9 locations like the PIG PEN or FRESH VEGGIES garden and build any scene you can imagine with 100 funny, cuddly and wild stickers! 

...and even more are on the way in future updates!

EACH STICKER HAS ITS OWN UNIQUE SOUND AND ANIMATION
Just tap and release a sticker to see and hear its custom animation and sound effect!

We've tweaked and tweaked (and will continue to tweak!) to give you creative control! Here's what you can do with your stickers...

MAKE THEM BIGGER, MAKE THEM SMALLER
• Use traditional pinch and zoom gestures to scale stickers to the size you want
• How we made it better: Only one finger has to touch the sticker when pinching and zooming so it's easy to do no matter how small it is!

ROTATE THEM ANY WHICH WAY
• Make a traditional rotation gesture to rotate
• How we made it better: Only one finger has to touch the sticker when rotating. Same deal, it's easier to grab even if it's tiny.
• Note: This option is turned off by default. You can toggle it on and off at any time while you're building your scene.

FLIP THEM
• Simply drag your sticker and it will face the direction you are moving. This is great for puppeteering play!

LOCK THEM DOWN
• Sometimes you just want a sticker to stay put so you can build on top of it! No problem! Just press the lock icon to lock the last sticker you touched. Press the icon again to unlock it.
• Pro tip: Alternately, you can hold your finger on a sticker for a few second to lock it in place or unlock it.

SORTED BY ANIMALS, PEOPLE, THINGS AND FAVORITES
• Use the handy tabs to go to different categories. 
• The stickers you use most will be stored up front in the FAVORITES tab!	

SO WHAT KINDA STICKERS ARE THERE ANYWAY?
You asked for it! Here's the complete list!

ANIMALS
• Pig
• Cow
• Chicken
• Sheep
• Goat

results.description:
TEACHER DESIGNED MATH LESSON PRACTICE FOR Pre-K TO 2nd GRADE
Animal Math School Edition is created by classroom teachers and tested with real students to build strong number sense through play. Perfect for centers, small-group instruction, intervention, homeschool, and independent practice, it supports the foundational skills taught in Pre-K, Kindergarten, 1st Grade, and 2nd Grade.

WHY TEACHERS & FAMILIES CHOOSE THE SCHOOL EDITION
• Classroom-ready: distraction-free experience designed for elementary learners
• Clear, kid-friendly instructions and visual models
• Short, replayable activities for skill fluency and confidence
• Progressive difficulty across grades for easy differentiation
• Designed for iPad & iPhone; great for school or home use
• Child-safe. No ads. No links. No complicated menus


PRE-K SKILLS (Early Learning & Readiness)

• Pattern recognition (AB/ABB/ABC)
• Shapes & colors
• Compare sizes: bigger/smaller
• Number identification
• Counting (objects & sets)
• Most & least
• Gentle math introduction

KINDERGARTEN SKILLS (Number Sense & Basics)

• Pre-K review for mastery
• Counting to higher numbers
• Number order/Cardinality
• Building numbers
• First & last
• Greatest & least
• Skip counting
• Addition & subtraction within 10
• Basic equations with visuals
• Picture models & ten-frames
• All prior skills at a higher difficulty

1ST GRADE SKILLS (Fluency & Reasoning)

• Kindergarten review for fluency
• Addition & subtraction within 20
• True/False equation checks
• Compare numbers: greater than, less than, equal to
• Even & odd
• Number sentences
• Word problems (read-to-solve)
• Advanced equations and missing numbers
• All prior skills at a higher difficulty

2ND GRADE SKILLS (Place Value & Multi-Step Thinking)

• 1st grade review for confidence
• Compare numbers: greater than, less than, or equal to
• Even & odd (reason with pairs)
• Place value (ones, tens, hundreds)
• Which sign is missing form the equation?
• Build the equation from models
• Complex equations & multi-step practice
• Intro to algebraic thinking
• All prior skills at a higher difficulty

BUILT FOR REAL CLASSROOMS
Animal Math School Edition focuses on essential concepts aligned with current state standards and modern, research-based teaching frameworks—including counting & cardinality, operations & algebraic thinking, and base-ten place value. Activities emphasize visual math, concrete models, and math talk to help learners explain their thinking.

GREAT FOR
• Pre-K, Kindergarten, 1st Grade, 2nd Grade
• Math centers, rotations, and stations
• RTI/MTSS, special education, and enrichment
• Homeschool and after-school practice

Thank you teachers for all you do!
results.trackCensoredName: Animal Math Games School Ed
results.trackName: Animal Math Games School Ed

results.description:
Featuring a colorful cast of silly pets from Ralphie the Cat to Oleg the Owl, join math-explorer Emma through more than 100 fun math games on a quest to help her animal friends explore the big city! 

Playable by kids of all ages with lots of positive encouragement, professional narration and catchy music.

Designed by parents and teachers, this app adheres to Common Core Standards for kindergarten math. 

COUNTING & NUMBER RECOGNITION
• To 100 by ones and by tens
• Count forward beginning from a any number 
• Connect counting to numbers 
• Answer “How many?” questions 
• Compare two numbers

ADDITION & SUBTRACTION
• Addition and subtraction with objects
• Fluently add and subtract within 5 
• Compare more of, less of 

CATEGORIES AND GEOMETRY
• Classify objects into given categories
• Correctly name shapes
• Analyze and compare shapes

ADDITIONAL FEATURES: 
• Items, numbers and instructions are professionally narrated 
• Players are rewarded with positive encouragement
• Parental controls: Turn off sounds, music, purchases and links to our other apps

EXPLORE THE JUNGLE
With no buttons, menus or ads, everything on the screen is interactive and encourages baby to touch and find flying toucans, giggling suns and bouncing bananas.

GET CREATIVE

results.description:
Building math skills and learning to multiply has never been more fun and intuitive! 

With "Show Me" and "Peek" features, play comes easy even for young learners.

This app adheres to Common Core Standards for third grade math and was designed by parents and teachers. 

LEARNING TO MULTIPLY: 
• Select a multiplier to practice specific equations
• Choose the best number range for your skill level
• "Show Me" option keeps cards face up for easier play  

BUILDING MATH SKILLS:  
• Match equations to their answers
• Match equations with the same answer 
• Hear the numbers and equations as you touch them
• Positive feedback and balloon popping rewards 

ADDITIONAL FEATURES: 
• Items, numbers and instructions are professionally narrated 
• Hints and options allow you to customize difficulty 
• Discover new card designs and layouts as you play
• Parental controls for sound, music and links
• We do not collect personal information from our users

COMMON CORE STANDARDS:
• CCSS.Math.Content.3.OA.A.4
• CCSS.Math.Content.3.OA.B.5
• CCSS.Math.Content.3.OA.B.6
• CCSS.Math.Content.3.OA.C.7 

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!!”

- Blake, Mike & Amanda, Eggroll Games

results.description:
Explore the farm with a counting sheep named Sherman, Pete the mischievous matching frog and all the barn animals you love as you join Lily the farmer through 100 fun learning games on a quest to help her barnyard buddies find a way home!

Playable by kids of all ages with lots of positive encouragement, professional narration and catchy music. Cute farm animals include cow, chicken, goat, pig, sheep, duck and frog! 

Designed by parents and teachers for pre-k kindergarten preparation, this app adheres to Common Core Standards for kindergarten math.

COUNTING & NUMBER RECOGNITION 
• Count forward from 1 to 10 
• Connect counting to numbers 
• Answer “How many?” questions 
• Compare numbers to groups of items

ADDITION & SUBTRACTION 
• Addition with objects 
• Subtraction with objects 
• Add and subtract within 5  

CATEGORIES, COLORS AND GEOMETRY 
• Classify objects into given categories 
• Correctly name shapes and colors 
• Analyze and compare shapes and colors

ADDITIONAL FEATURES: 
• Items, numbers and instructions are professionally narrated 
• Players are rewarded with positive encouragement 
• Parental controls: Turn off sounds, music, purchases and links to our other apps 
• We do not collect personal information from our users. 

COMMON CORE STANDARDS 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.A.1 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.A.2 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.B.4 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.B.5 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.C.7 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.OA.A.1
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.MD.B.3 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.G.A.2

===================================== 

Eggroll Games builds interactive toys that promote learning and engage children through colorful interactivity without confusing buttons or menus. 

Like us on Facebook at facebook.com/eggrollgames, follow us on Twitter @eggrollgames or drop in for a visit at EggrollGames.com!
